feedback.text: It would be good to include videogames into this. Currently game publishers are abusing consumers by selling them "lisences" and taking money for all kinds of things.. and can just outright take it away for no reason at all. Also they can take away your games and purchuses at their will. This is not good for a consumer at all. A mere "Warning laber" is not enough. Digital goods as a mere "lisence" that can be rewoked at any moment without any reason. is very consumer unfriendly. People spends hundreds of euros on this..
